skills.description_zh: This skill should be used when the user's conversation involves medication-related questions, drug inquiries, prescription interpretation, medication interaction checks, dosage guidance, or any pharmaceutical consultation. It handles intent recognition for medication topics, parses attachments (medical records, prescriptions, health profiles, exam reports), maintains independent memory for patient context (demographics, medical history, treatment history), interfaces with drug-matching models, and provides consumer-facing medication guidance. Trigger phrases include drug names, 用药, 吃药, 药品, 处方, 配伍, 禁忌, 剂量, 用法用量, 药物相互作用, 过敏, 不良反应, 副作用, or any medication-related query. This skill does NOT handle drug pricing, inventory, procurement, or non-medical pharmaceutical topics.
